ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the model */,
  "num_train_samples" REAL /* Number of training samples used */,
  "num_test_samples" REAL /* Number of testing samples used */,
  "num_labels" INTEGER /* Number of labels used */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "trained_at" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "cov_at_1" REAL /* Coverage at 1 */,
  "cov_at_2" REAL /* Coverage at 2 */,
  "cov_at_3" REAL /* Coverage at 3 */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_teams" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the team to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_repository" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was added to the repository */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the model (public or private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_repository_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset (training or testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
